result.stdout:
Description:
  APM - The AI Package Manager

Usage:
  apm [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  init <name>         🚀 Initialize a new APM project
  install <packages>  📦 Install APM packages
  compile             🚀 Compile APM context into distributed AGENTS.md files
  run <script>        ▶ Run a script with parameters
  preview <script>    👀 Preview a script's compiled prompt files
  list                📋 List available scripts in the current project
  deps                📋 Manage APM package dependencies
  config              ⚙ Configure APM CLI
